headline: EQT Highlights AI Value Creation And Leadership Shift For Future Growth
summary: EQT (OM:EQT) announced a Value Creation Day focused on its AI investment strategy and portfolio usage. The event will highlight how EQT applies artificial intelligence to support value creation across its holdings. EQT also nominated Jean Eric Salata as the next Chairperson of the Board, signaling an upcoming leadership change. EQT (OM:EQT) is a global investment firm with a broad private markets focus, where data and technology are increasingly central to how value is created. Across...
